key_finding: The 'reversed dissociation' (-38.5pp) on Qwen-Instruct is PREDOMINANTLY A POSITIONAL CONFOUND. SelTC targets early positions (0.242), SelAC targets late positions (0.991). POS_EARLY=19.2% vs POS_LATE=65.4% (+46pp) explains the gap. Within-early-half gap collapses to +3.8pp. This mirrors exp_013's finding on Llama — selectivity-based destruction is confounded with position on ALL tested instruct models.
evidence_impact: Major revision: (1) 'Reversed dissociation' on Qwen-Instruct is not a genuine instruction-tuning channel reversal — it's a positional artifact. (2) Selectivity-based destruction provides no genuine spatial structure evidence on instruct models. (3) Only PGD on Qwen-Base provides position-independent evidence for the hidden channel. (4) Need to test whether exp_004/005 destruction dissociations on Qwen-Base also survive positional controls.
next_planned: Positional confound test on Qwen-Base (POS_EARLY vs POS_LATE) to determine if the original +24pp dissociation also reduces to position; OR position-controlled selectivity analysis (within narrow position quartiles) to salvage residual selectivity effects; OR PGD position-independence verification
open_questions_answered: Q43: reversed dissociation is a positional confound, not genuine
new_open_questions: Q47: does PGD on Qwen-Base show positional confound?
Q48: why early positions critical on both instruct models?
Q49: is exp_004/005 destruction on Qwen-Base also positional?

null_space_existence.status: strong (Qwen-Base PGD only) / none (Llama) / positional confound (Qwen-Instruct)

spatial_structure.status: PGD rho=0.78 on Qwen-Base is genuine. ALL destruction dissociations are positional confounds on instruct models

natural_usage.status: H2O/TC protection works via position (noise late positions). AC fails (noises early). Not channel-specific

cross_model_replication.status: Destruction dissociation confounded with position on Llama-Instruct AND Qwen-Instruct. Only PGD on Qwen-Base is position-independent

encoding_strategy.status: Qwen-Base: PGD-validated concentrated. Llama+Qwen-Instruct: position dominates, selectivity confounded
